nasb.text: Six branches shall go out from its sides; three branches of the lampstand from its one side and three branches of the lampstand from its other side.

esv.text: And there shall be six branches going out of its sides, three branches of the lampstand out of one side of it and three branches of the lampstand out of the other side of it;

cnv.text: 燈臺的兩邊伸出六個枝子；一邊有三個燈臺枝子，另一邊也有三個燈臺枝子。

ccb.text: 灯台的两边要各伸出三个分枝，共六个分枝。
